# claude-managed-agents_deployment (Data Source)

Look up an existing Claude Managed Agents deployment by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    claude-managed-agents = {
      source  = "modus-agendi/anthropic-claude-managed-agents"
      version = "~> 0.4"
    }
  }
}

provider "claude-managed-agents" {}

# Look up an existing deployment by id. Useful when the deployment was created
# outside Terraform (via the SDK or console) and you want to read its current
# configuration and observed status.
data "claude-managed-agents_deployment" "nightly_digest" {
  id = "depl_01HqR2k7vXbZ9mNpL3wYcT8f"
}

output "deployment_status" {
  # Observed run state: "active" or "paused".
  value = data.claude-managed-agents_deployment.nightly_digest.status
}

output "deployment_agent_version" {
  # The concrete agent version the deployment pinned.
  value = data.claude-managed-agents_deployment.nightly_digest.agent_version
}

output "deployment_schedule" {
  value = data.claude-managed-agents_deployment.nightly_digest.schedule
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Server-assigned identifier (e.g. `depl_01ABC...`).

### Read-Only

- `agent` (String) Agent id.
- `agent_version` (Number) Resolved agent version.
- `archived_at` (String) ISO 8601 archive timestamp, or null.
- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Description, or null.
- `desired_status` (String) Intended run state (mirrors `status` when read via the data source).
- `environment_id` (String) Environment id.
- `initial_events` (Attributes List) Events sent to each session on start. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--initial_events))
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata map.
- `name` (String) Deployment name.
- `paused_reason` (Attributes) Why the deployment is paused, or null. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--paused_reason))
- `resources` (Attributes List) Mounted resources. `authorization_token` is write-only upstream and always null here. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resources))
- `schedule` (Attributes) Cron schedule, or null. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))
- `status` (String) Observed run state: `active` or `paused`.
- `vault_ids` (List of String) Mounted vault ids.

<a id="nestedatt--initial_events"></a>
### Nested Schema for `initial_events`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `max_iterations` (Number)
- `rubric` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--initial_events--rubric))
- `type` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--initial_events--rubric"></a>
### Nested Schema for `initial_events.rubric`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String)
- `file_id` (String)
- `type` (String)



<a id="nestedatt--paused_reason"></a>
### Nested Schema for `paused_reason`

Read-Only:

- `error` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--paused_reason--error))
- `type` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--paused_reason--error"></a>
### Nested Schema for `paused_reason.error`

Read-Only:

- `message` (String)
- `type` (String)



<a id="nestedatt--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resources`

Read-Only:

- `access` (String)
- `authorization_token` (String)
- `authorization_token_wo_version` (Number)
- `checkout` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resources--checkout))
- `file_id` (String)
- `instructions` (String)
- `memory_store_id` (String)
- `mount_path` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `url` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--resources--checkout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resources.checkout`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `sha` (String)
- `type` (String)



<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Read-Only:

- `expression` (String)
- `timezone` (String)
- `type` (String)
